demo_timestamps.description: Demonstrating the next generation Autodesk App Store platform enhancements
Describing improvements in search and navigation and a redesigned product details page

ai_technologies.name: Autodesk Assistant
ai_technologies.context: Conversational AI to improve solution discovery

summary: The video discusses the upcoming launch of the next generation Autodesk App Store, which aims to enhance user experience and boost publisher growth through improved search, navigation, and AI-driven discovery. It also highlights the introduction of an AI marketplace and Autodesk Assistant to aid in conversational solution discovery, thereby offering a significant advantage to early-adopting publishers.
